snippets.name: 顺序编号改名
snippets.content:
i=1
for f in %F; do
  dir="${f:h}"
  ext="${f:e}"
  if [[ -n "$ext" ]]; then
    mv -- "$f" "${dir}/$(printf '%03d' $i).${ext}"
  else
    mv -- "$f" "${dir}/$(printf '%03d' $i)"
  fi
  ((i++))
done
echo "已重命名 $((i-1)) 个文件"

snippets.name: 按文件名排序后顺序编号
snippets.content:
typeset -a files
for f in %F; do files+=("$f"); done
files=(${(o)files})

i=1
for f in $files; do
  dir="${f:h}"
  ext="${f:e}"
  if [[ -n "$ext" ]]; then
    mv -- "$f" "${dir}/$(printf '%03d' $i).${ext}"
  else
    mv -- "$f" "${dir}/$(printf '%03d' $i)"
  fi
  ((i++))
done
echo "已重命名 $((i-1)) 个文件（按文件名排序）"

snippets.name: 加日期前缀
snippets.content:
prefix=$(date +%Y%m%d)
for f in %F; do
  dir="${f:h}"
  name="${f:t}"
  [[ "$name" == ${prefix}_* ]] && continue
  mv -- "$f" "${dir}/${prefix}_${name}"
done
echo "已为选中文件添加前缀 ${prefix}_"

snippets.name: 加文件夹名前缀
snippets.content:
prefix="%w"
for f in %F; do
  dir="${f:h}"
  name="${f:t}"
  [[ "$name" == ${prefix}_* ]] && continue
  mv -- "$f" "${dir}/${prefix}_${name}"
done
echo "已添加前缀 ${prefix}_"

snippets.name: 空格替换为下划线
snippets.content:
for f in %F; do
  dir="${f:h}"
  name="${f:t}"
  newname="${name// /_}"
  [[ "$name" == "$newname" ]] && continue
  mv -- "$f" "${dir}/${newname}"
  echo "${name} -> ${newname}"
done

snippets.name: 扩展名转小写
snippets.content:
for f in %F; do
  dir="${f:h}"
  base="${f:t:r}"
  ext="${f:e:l}"
  new="${dir}/${base}.${ext}"
  [[ "$f" == "$new" ]] && continue
  mv -- "$f" "$new"
done
echo "扩展名已统一为小写"

snippets.name: 按扩展名分子目录
snippets.content:
for f in %F; do
  ext="${f:e:l}"
  ext="${ext:-no_extension}"
  dest="%d/${ext}"
  mkdir -p "$dest"
  mv -- "$f" "$dest/"
done
echo "已按扩展名整理到子目录"

snippets.name: 生成文件清单
snippets.content:
manifest="%d/file_manifest_%date.txt"
{
  echo "# 清单生成于 $(date)"
  echo "# 选中项数: %N"
  echo "---"
  for p in %P; do
    stat -f "%Sm %z %N" -t "%Y-%m-%d %H:%M" "$p"
  done
} > "$manifest"
echo "已写入 $manifest"

snippets.name: 生成 SHA256 校验清单
snippets.content:
checksum="%d/checksums_%date.sha256"
: > "$checksum"
for f in %F; do
  shasum -a 256 "$f" >> "$checksum"
done
echo "校验文件: $checksum"
cat "$checksum"

snippets.name: 复制路径到剪贴板
snippets.content:
printf '%s\n' %P | pbcopy
echo "已复制 %N 条路径到剪贴板"

snippets.name: 统计选中文件大小
snippets.content:
total=0
for f in %F; do
  size=$(stat -f%z "$f")
  total=$((total + size))
  mb=$(awk -v s="$size" 'BEGIN { printf "%.2f MB", s/1048576 }')
  echo "${mb}  ${f:t}"
done
echo "---"
echo "共 %N 个文件, 合计 ${total} 字节"

snippets.name: 批量生成缩略图
snippets.content:
thumbdir="%d/thumbnails"
mkdir -p "$thumbdir"
for f in %F; do
  base="${f:t:r}"
  sips -Z 800 "$f" --out "${thumbdir}/${base}_thumb.jpg" >/dev/null
done
echo "缩略图目录: $thumbdir"
open "$thumbdir"

snippets.name: HEIC 转 JPG
snippets.content:
for f in %F; do
  dir="${f:h}"
  base="${f:t:r}"
  sips -s format jpeg "$f" --out "${dir}/${base}.jpg"
done
echo "转换完成"

snippets.name: 批量设为可执行
snippets.content:
for f in %F; do
  chmod +x "$f"
  echo "可执行: $f"
done

snippets.name: Markdown 字数统计
snippets.content:
total=0
for f in %F; do
  chars=$(wc -m < "$f" | tr -d ' ')
  words=$(wc -w < "$f" | tr -d ' ')
  total=$((total + words))
  echo "${f:t}: ${words} 词 / ${chars} 字符"
done
echo "--- 合计 ${total} 词"

snippets.name: 删除前预览
snippets.content:
echo "将删除以下 %N 项:"
for p in %P; do
  echo "  $p"
done
echo "--- 此为预览，未实际删除"

snippets.name: 复制当前目录 PDF 列表
snippets.content:
ls -1 "%d"/*.pdf 2>/dev/null | while read f; do
  echo "$(basename "$f")"
done | pbcopy
echo "当前目录 PDF 文件名已复制到剪贴板"
